articles.title: Hindalco shares jump nearly 4% ahead of May 22 results
articles.summary: Hindalco Industries shares surged 3.43% to ₹1,077.90 on NSE ahead of the company's Q4 and full-year FY26 results, due for board approval on 22 May.

articles.title: From CBAM to recycling growth, here's how supply shocks and sustainability race redraw the global aluminium map
articles.summary: Supply chain tightening from Gulf conflict disruptions and CBAM implementation are accelerating recycling investments and shifting global scrap trade patterns toward increased secondary aluminium production.
articles.novelis_angle: CBAM charges on high-carbon primary imports strengthen the competitive position of Novelis's high-recycled-content FRP as the EU prepares to extend CBAM scope to downstream aluminium products from 2028.

articles.title: Positive factors still provide support, but upside room for aluminium prices is limited
articles.summary: LME aluminium 3-month closed at $3,660/t on 16 May as LME inventory fell 11,700 tonnes week-on-week to 346,500 tonnes; volatile US–Iran negotiations and elevated US CPI data send conflicting signals on near-term price direction.
articles.novelis_angle: With LME inventory at multi-month lows and P1020 premiums elevated by Gulf disruptions, Novelis faces a tight input market as it simultaneously ramps Oswego recovery and advances Bay Minette commissioning.
